notes: 309+ electrolyte sachet products on Amazon, highly crowded market dominated by Liquid IV, Nuun, etc. No clear differentiation opportunity.
Energy supplement market extremely crowded. Creatine/carnitine/CoQ10 combo not unique enough.
418+ results for multi-use essential oil blends on Amazon. Saturated market.
Multivitamin market is one of the most crowded categories. Centrum already in US.
Boiron already sells this in US. Also homeopathic products face regulatory and credibility challenges.
362+ arnica gel products on Amazon. Crowded market with established brands.
Premium mineral sunscreen market already served by La Roche-Posay, EltaMD, Supergoop, etc.
Keto meal replacement market very crowded (Keto Chow, KetoLogic, Perfect Keto, etc.)
Vicks already in US market. Nasal spray category has FDA regulations and is crowded.
Throat lozenge market saturated (Halls, Ricola, Cepacol, etc.)
Propolis throat sprays already available from multiple brands on Amazon. Not unique enough.

product_name: Esi Tea Tree Oil Remedy Oil
notes: Tea tree oil market very crowded. Hundreds of brands offering pharmaceutical-grade tea tree oil.
Non-steroidal eczema creams already well-represented (Aveeno, CeraVe, Eucerin, Vanicream, etc.)
Melatonin + immune support supplements widely available. Not differentiated enough.
Pure aloe vera gel market crowded. Drinkable aloe available from many brands.
Liquid iron supplements exist but are niche. Manufacturing cost for liquid formulation high relative to pill alternatives. Margin potential weak.
